description.zh: 基于 GitHub Pages 的静态个人站点，展示学习笔记、收藏与代码作品，支持明暗主题与中英文切换。
description.en: A static personal site on GitHub Pages with notes, favorites, projects, theme toggle, and bilingual UI.

description.zh: 输入法相关学习与实践项目，探索键盘输入、词库与引擎实现。
description.en: A learning project on input methods, exploring keyboard input, dictionaries, and engine design.
